// <auto-generated by Tech-Cosmos Hub />
using System;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using TechCosmos.CombatSystem.Runtime;
using TechCosmos.Core.Runtime;
using UnityEngine;

namespace TechCosmos.Game.Adapters
{
    public sealed class GameEntityRegistry
    {
        private int _nextId = 1;
        private readonly Dictionary<int, Entry> _entries = new();

        public CombatEntityRegistry CombatRegistry { get; } = new();

        public EntityHandle Register(object owner, Transform transform, IDamageable damageable = null, IHealable healable = null)
        {
            if (owner == null) throw new ArgumentNullException(nameof(owner));

            var handle = new EntityHandle(_nextId++);
            _entries[handle.Id] = new Entry(owner, transform, damageable, healable);

            if (damageable != null) CombatRegistry.Register(damageable);
            if (healable != null) CombatRegistry.Register(healable);

            return handle;
        }

        public void Unregister(EntityHandle handle)
        {
            if (!handle.IsValid) return;

            if (_entries.TryGetValue(handle.Id, out var entry))
            {
                if (entry.Damageable != null) CombatRegistry.Unregister(handle);
                if (entry.Healable != null) CombatRegistry.Unregister(handle);
                _entries.Remove(handle.Id);
            }
        }

        public bool TryGetOwner(EntityHandle handle, out object owner)
        {
            if (handle.IsValid && _entries.TryGetValue(handle.Id, out var entry))
            {
                owner = entry.Owner;
                return true;
            }

            owner = null;
            return false;
        }

        public bool TryGetTransform(EntityHandle handle, out Transform transform)
        {
            if (handle.IsValid && _entries.TryGetValue(handle.Id, out var entry))
            {
                transform = entry.Transform;
                return transform != null;
            }

            transform = null;
            return false;
        }

        public EntityHandle GetHandle(object owner)
        {
            if (owner == null) return EntityHandle.Invalid;

            foreach (var pair in _entries)
            {
                if (ReferenceEquals(pair.Value.Owner, owner))
                    return new EntityHandle(pair.Key);
            }

            return EntityHandle.Invalid;
        }

        public void Clear()
        {
            _entries.Clear();
            _nextId = 1;
        }

        private sealed class Entry
        {
            public object Owner { get; }
            public Transform Transform { get; }
            public IDamageable Damageable { get; }
            public IHealable Healable { get; }

            public Entry(object owner, Transform transform, IDamageable damageable, IHealable healable)
            {
                Owner = owner;
                Transform = transform;
                Damageable = damageable;
                Healable = healable;
            }
        }
    }
}
